changes.description: Added cross-reference sentence at the end of the Pages cell: 'For details about configuring *Read* and *Update* permissions for specific roles, see {% page_link permissions_pagelevel_xp anchor="Edit page permissions" linkText="page permission management" %}.' This supplements the existing Read/Update permission descriptions with a descriptive link to the hub page's section on configuring page permissions for roles.

notes: Minimal cross-reference update only — no existing content removed or rewritten. The new sentence uses descriptive link text ('page permission management') per REC-005 and INV-crossref-009, avoiding vague text like 'click here'. The anchor 'Edit page permissions' is verified against the actual heading at line 132 of page-permission-management.md (INV-crossref-005). The identifier 'permissions_pagelevel_xp' is verified against front matter at line 4 of the target page (INV-crossref-003). No 'must' directed at a person (INV-style-132 satisfied — sentence uses 'see' as the imperative, which is standard documentation phrasing). The docFact confirms Read is needed to view version history and Update to restore — the existing content already states this correctly, so no content changes were needed beyond the cross-reference addition.
